textAr: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
textEn: Was there not a period of time when man was not a thing [even] mentioned?
textTranslit: Hal ataa 'alal insaani heenum minad dahri lam yakun shai'am mazkooraa

textAr: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
textEn: Indeed, We created man from a drop of mixed fluids, in order to test him. So We gave him hearing and sight.
textTranslit: Innaa khalaqnal insaana min nutfatin amshaajin nabta leehi faja'alnaahu samee'am baseeraa

textAr: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
textEn: Indeed, We showed him the way, whether he is grateful or ungrateful.
textTranslit: Innaa hadainaahus sabeela immaa shaakiranw wa immaa kafoora

textAr: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
textEn: We have surely prepared for the disbelievers chains, shackles, and a Blazing Fire.
textTranslit: Innaaa a'tadnaa lilkaa fireena salaasila wa aghlaalanw wa sa'eeraa

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] flavored with camphor,
textTranslit: innal abraara yashra boona min kaasin kaana mizaa juhaa kaafooraa

textAr: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
textEn: a spring from which Allah’s slaves will drink, which will flow as they wish.
textTranslit: 'Aynany yashrabu bihaa 'ibaadul laahi yafajjiroonahaa tafjeeraa

textAr: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
textEn: They fulfill their vows and fear a Day whose evil will spread far and wide,
textTranslit: Yoofoona binnazri wa yakhaafoona yawman kaana sharruhoo mustateeraa

textAr: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
textEn: and they give food, despite their love for it, to the needy, the orphans, and the captives,
textTranslit: Wa yut''imoonat ta'aama 'alaa hubbihee miskeenanw wa yatemanw wa aseeraa

textAr: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
textEn: [saying to themselves] “We feed you only for the sake of Allah; we seek from you neither reward nor gratitude.
textTranslit: Innaamaa nut'imukum li wajhil laahi laa nureedu minkum jazaaa'anw wa laa shukooraa

textAr: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
textEn: We fear from our Lord a grim and distressful Day.”
textTranslit: Innaa nakhaafu mir Rabbinna Yawman 'aboosan qamtareeraa

textAr: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
textEn: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day, and will grant them radiance and delight,
textTranslit: Fa waqaahumul laahu sharra zaalikal yawmi wa laqqaahum nadratanw wa surooraa

textAr: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
textEn: and will reward them for their perseverance with Paradise and garments of silk.
textTranslit: Wa jazaahum bimaa sabaroo janatanw wa hareeraa

textAr: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
textEn: They will recline therein on adorned couches; neither feeling scorching heat nor freezing cold.
textTranslit: muttaki'eena feeha 'alal araaa 'iki laa yarawna feehaa shamsanw wa laa zamhareeraa

textAr: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
textEn: with shady branches spread above them, and clusters of fruit will be made within their reach.
textTranslit: Wa daaniyatan 'alaihim zilaaluhaa wa zullilat qutoofu haa tazleela

textAr: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
textEn: They will be served frequently with silver vessels and crystal cups,
textTranslit: Wa yutaafu 'alaihim bi aaniyatim min fiddatinw wa akwaabin kaanat qawaareeraa

textAr: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
textEn: crystalline goblets of silver, filled precisely as desired.
textTranslit: Qawaareera min fiddatin qaddaroohaa taqdeeraa

textAr: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
textEn: They will be given a glass [of wine] flavored with ginger
textTranslit: Wa yusawna feehaa kaasan kaana mizaajuhaa zanjabeelaa

textAr: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
textEn: from a spring therein called Salsabīl.
textTranslit: 'Aynan feeha tusammaa salsabeelaa

textAr: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
textEn: They will be served by eternal young boys; if you see them, you would think that they are scattered pearls.
textTranslit: Wa yatoofu 'alaihim wildaanum mukhalladoona izaa ra aytahum hasibtahum lu'lu 'am mansoora

textAr: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
textEn: If you were to look around, you would see bliss and a vast dominion.
textTranslit: Wa izaa ra ayta summa ra ayta na'eemanw wa mulkan kabeera

textAr: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
textEn: They will be dressed in garments of fine green silk and rich brocade, and will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a pure drink.
textTranslit: 'Aaliyahum siyaabu sundusin khudrunw wa istabraq, wa hullooo asaawira min fiddatinw wa saqaahum Rabbuhum sharaaban tahooraa

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
textEn: [And they will be told,] “Indeed, this is your reward, and your efforts have been appreciated.”
textTranslit: Innaa haazaa kaana lakum jazz 'anw wa kaana sa'yukum mashkooraa

textAr: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, it is We Who have sent down the Qur’an to you in stages.
textTranslit: Innaa nahnu nazzalnaa 'alaikal quraana tanzeelaa

textAr: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
textEn: So be patient with your Lord’s decree, and do not obey any sinner or disbeliever from among them.
textTranslit: Fasbir lihukmi Rabbika wa laa tuti' minhum aasiman aw kafooraa

textAr: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
textEn: And remember the Name of your Lord morning and evening,
textTranslit: Wazkuris ma Rabbika bukratanw wa aseelaa

textAr: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
textEn: and prostrate to Him at night, and glorify Him at length by night.
textTranslit: Wa minal laili fasjud lahoo wa sabbihhu lailan taweelaa

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, these [pagans] love this fleeting life and pay no heed to a heavy Day ahead of them.
textTranslit: Inna haaa'ulaa'i yuhibboona 'aajilata wa yazaroona waraaa'ahum yawman saqeelaa

textAr: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
textEn: It is We Who created them and strengthened their build. If We will, We can replace them with others like them.
textTranslit: Nahnu khalaqnaahum wa shadadnaaa asrahum wa izaa shi'naa baddalnaaa amsaala hum tabdeelaa

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, this is a reminder; so let anyone who wills may take a way to his Lord.
textTranslit: Inna haazihee tazkiratun fa man shaaa'at takhaza ilaa rabbihee sabeela

textAr: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
textEn: But you cannot will unless Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
textTranslit: Wa maa tashaaa'oona illaa anyyashaaa'al laah; innal laahaa kaana'Aleeman Hakeema

textAr: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
textEn: He admits whom He wills into His mercy, but for the wrongdoers He has prepared a painful punishment.
textTranslit: Yudkhilu mai yashaaa'u fee rahmatih; wazzaalimeena a'adda lahum 'azaaban aleemaa
